info.name: Help PR — All APIs (single collection)
info.description:
**Single Postman collection** for `help-pr-backend-staging`. Import only this file.

**Generated:** 2026-05-20 via `node postman/merge-all-collections.mjs`

**Sources merged (8) from `postman/archive/`:**
- `archive/Help-PR-Orders-Module.postman_collection.json`
- `archive/Help-PR-Order-Charges-Payments.postman_collection.json`
- `archive/Help-PR-Partner-Franchise-Dropdowns.postman_collection.json`
- `archive/content-expense-expense-category-management.postman_collection (1).json`
- `archive/Area-Management.postman_collection.json`
- `archive/Help-PR-Area-Franchise-Subscription-UserTypes.postman_collection.json`
- `archive/Help-PR-Area-Franchise-Subscription.postman_collection.json`
- `archive/Help-PR-Admin-Dashboard.postman_collection.json`
- Built-in: Partner payout (4 requests)
- Built-in: Order refunds (4 requests)
- Built-in: Partners browse — admin `GET /api/partners` (2 requests)
- Built-in: Partner post management — admin `/api/partner-post` (4 requests)
- Built-in: Appointment calendar — admin `/api/appointment` (6 requests)

**Dedup:** Same HTTP method + path template (+ getCount `type` in body) → one request; higher-priority source wins.

**Setup:** Set `baseUrl`. Run **00 — Auth → Login** to set `accessToken` / `token`.

**Docs:** `docs/ORDER_MODULE_FRONTEND.md`, `docs/RAZORPAY_ONLINE_PAYMENTS_AUDIT.md`, `docs/SUBSCRIPTION_CHANGE_FRONTEND.md`, `docs/ORDER_GETALL_API_CHANGES.md`, `docs/APPOINTMENT_MODULE_FRONTEND.md`, `docs/PARTNER_PAYOUT_FRONTEND.md`, `docs/PARTNER_POST_FRONTEND.md`, `docs/REFUND_API.md`, `docs/REFUND_FRONTEND.md`, `postman/Help-PR-Refunds.postman_collection.json`

**Mobile:** folder **Mobile → Partner** / **Mobile → User** — run `node postman/build-mobile-folder.mjs` to refresh.

request.description:
**GET /api/dashboard/stats** — Admin home dashboard KPIs in one response.

**Access:** Super admin (5), admin (1), staff (6), employee (3). Partner / customer → **403**.

**Auth:** `Bearer {{accessToken}}` (run **00 — Auth → Login**).

**Query:** `franchise_id` (optional), `from_date`, `to_date` (optional — omit both for **all-time** stats; pass one or both to filter).

**Date filters (only when from_date and/or to_date sent):**
- `quotes` — `created_at` in range
- `orders` — schedule / `order_date` overlap (same as order list)
- `payments` — completed `order_payment` rows by `paid_at` (fallback `created_at`), plus legacy `is_paid` orders without payment rows (order schedule date)
- `services` / `partners` — current snapshot (not date-filtered)

**Response `record`:**
| Key | Fields |
|-----|--------|
| `quotes` | `requests_received`, `in_progress`, `completed`, `cancelled` |
| `orders` | `in_progress`, `completed`, `cancelled` |
| `payments` | `total_payments`, `customer`, `partner`, `commission` (₹ amounts) |
| `services` | `total`, `active`, `inactive` |
| `partners` | `total`, `active`, `inactive` (approved partners, `verification_status: 2`) |
| meta | `franchise_id`, `from_date`, `to_date` |

item.description:
**GET** `/api/franchise/related-catalog/:franchise_id`

Each customer includes **`addresses`**: all non-deleted **`address`** documents for that user (same fields as user getAll), sorted by **`created_at`** ascending.

item.name: Franchise category — update
item.description:
PUT /api/franchise-category/update/:id.

**A — Partition toggle (default):** Body with **`active_categories`** and/or **`inactive_categories`** (ObjectId string arrays). They must **partition** every `category_id` in `categories_list`. **`categories_list` is not persisted** from this toggle. **Cascade:** any category moved to **inactive** forces services under that category (same franchise) from **`active_services`** → **`inactive_services`** on the mapping doc.

**B — Replace full list:** Super admin (or franchise admin under rules) may send **`categories_list`** — then `active_*` / `inactive_*` / **`categories_order`** are rebuilt from the payload.

**C — Reorder only:** **`categories_order`** alone (permutation of mapped ids). Responses hydrate `categories_list[].is_active` from `active_categories`.

_Source: Help-PR-Area-Franchise-Subscription.postman_collection.json → Franchise_

request.description: Token type 5 or 6.

request.description: Combine with client-side tabs or add `status` / `is_request` for server-side slices.
Uses same auth; optional query params per controller.
Detail drawer / view action.
Accepted / legacy only.
Same rules as create; bulk Excel requires types 5 or 6.

Use **Franchise Admin** token tied to **`{{franchise_id}}`**. Returns pending global category requests submitted by users under that franchise. Remove `approval_status=pending` to include other approval states while keeping `is_request=true`.

**Request body (JSON)** — `name`, `desc`, `image_url` (non-empty strings), `service_ids` (non-empty array of existing Service ObjectIds). Middleware sets `is_request=true`; controller sets `approval_status: "pending"`, `requested_by` = JWT user, `is_active` default false. Optional: `city_ids`, `state_ids` (arrays of ObjectId strings). Alternate: `multipart/form-data` with field `image` instead of `image_url` per `categoryCreateParser`.

**Response (200)** — `{ "success": true, "status": 200, "message": "Category created successfully.", "record": { ...Category document } }` with `is_request: true`, `approval_status: "pending"`.

**Response (409)** — duplicate name: `{ "success": false, "status": 409, "message": "Category name already exists." }`.

**Response (400)** — validation / invalid ObjectId in `service_ids` / cities / states.

item.name: 21 — Order
item.description:
**/api/order** — Orders, nested charges/payments on create/update.

**Razorpay online at checkout:** **3a. Create order (Razorpay online)** — `payment_mode_id: "2"` + `name`, `email`, `contact` → `record.payment_url`. Mid-order customer Razorpay: use **mobile** `POST /api/mobile/user/orders/:id/payments` (admin **23 — Order payments** `online` is label-only). See `docs/RAZORPAY_ONLINE_PAYMENTS_AUDIT.md`.

query.description: in-progress | completed | cancelled | refunded. Invalid → 409. Disable param to omit.
unpaid | paid | partially_paid | refund | partially_refund. Disable to omit.
Free-text: unique_id, users, category, service, quote, city, franchise. Disable if empty.
ISO date. Alone = that UTC calendar day. With to_date = schedule overlap + order_date fallback. Disable to omit.
ISO date. Same single-day rule when used alone. Disable to omit.
Super/staff: optional filter. Franchise admin/employee: auto-scoped; must match own franchise or 403. Disable to omit.
Customer ObjectId filter. Disable to omit.
Partner ObjectId filter. Disable to omit.
Employee ObjectId filter. Disable to omit.
created_at | updated_at | order_date | order_status | total_price | sub_total | unique_id | is_paid | payment_status | tax | min_deposit | order_description
Legacy: 1 = asc, else desc if sort_order omitted

request.description:
**GET /api/order/getAll** — paginated order list (staff/backoffice).

**Access:** Super admin, staff, franchise admin, franchise employee. Partner / customer → **403** (customers: **GET /api/order/getCustomerOrder?user_id=**).

**Date filters:** Enable only `from_date` for single-day; only `to_date` for single-day; both for range.

**Response:** Hydrated rows with display names; `payment_status` on each record.

See `docs/ORDER_GETALL_API_CHANGES.md` for franchise scope and search behavior.

**GET /api/order/get/:id** — full order detail in one call.

**Includes:** populated customer/city/category/partner/employee/franchise/service/quote; **`service_items`** with line detail; **`additional_charges`**; **`order_payments`**; **`order_offer`** (if offer applied); **`payment_status`**; customer payment breakdown fields.

**Access:** Super admin / staff — any order. Franchise admin / employee — own franchise only. Partner / customer → **403**.

Use this instead of separate list-charges / list-payments calls for read-only UI.

item.name: 22 — Order additional charges
item.description:
**/api/order-additional-charges** — CRUD extra line items; **recalculates `order.total_price`**.

**`payment_method`** on a charge is a **label only** (cash/upi/online/…) — **no Razorpay link** is created here. Customer pays the increased balance via **order payments** (mobile: `POST /api/mobile/user/orders/:id/payments` with `payment_method: online`). See `docs/RAZORPAY_ONLINE_PAYMENTS_AUDIT.md`.

request.description:
**POST /create**

**Required:** `order_id`, `amount` (> 0).

**Optional:** `label`, `description`, `charge_type`, **`payment_method`**: `cash` | `upi` | `card` | `online` | `bank_transfer` | `other` (invalid → stored as `other`) — **metadata only**, not Razorpay.

Customer pays via mobile order payments after charge. Tax uses order rules. Saves `additionalChargeId`.
**DELETE /delete/:id** — soft-delete; recalculates order `total_price` and may affect `payment_status` / due amount.
**GET /by-order/:orderId** — active charges for the order. Prefer **GET /api/order/get/:id** for full detail in one call.
**PUT /update/:id** — partial body; recalculates order totals.

item.name: 23 — Order payments
item.description:
**/api/order-payments** — Customer/partner payment ledger on an order.

**Razorpay (customer):** `POST /create` with `payment_method: online` → **202** + `record.payment_url`; poll **`GET /payment-status/:id`**. Optional `name`, `email`, `contact` on create (else from customer profile). Also **21 → 3a** for full checkout.

**Partner `payer_type: partner`:** credits wallet when `completed` (see **37 — Partner payout**). Audit: `docs/RAZORPAY_ONLINE_PAYMENTS_AUDIT.md`.

request.description:
**POST /create**

**Required:** `order_id`, **`payer_type`**: `customer` | `partner`, `amount`.

**Optional:** `payment_method`, **`status`**: `pending` | `completed` | `failed` | `refunded`, `transaction_reference`, `installment_index`, `due_date`, `paid_at`, `notes`.

**`payment_method: online`** (customer only, `amount` > 0): **202** + `record.payment_url`. Optional `name`, `email`, `contact` for Razorpay. Poll **GET /payment-status/:id**.

**Offline customer + completed:** updates `payment_status` when sum ≥ `total_price`.

**Partner:** `"payer_type": "partner"`. **Refund:** `"status": "refunded"`.
**POST /create** with `payment_method: online`. **202** + `record.payment_url`. Customer profile must have email or phone (or pass `name`, `email`, `contact`). Then **Get payment status (Razorpay)**.
**GET /api/order-payments/payment-status/:id** — poll after Razorpay pay. `data.status` → `completed` when applied; `sync.synced: true` if webhook missed.
**DELETE /delete/:id** — soft-delete; re-syncs parent **`payment_status`**.

item.name: 30 — Notifications (inbox API)
item.description:
**Inbox APIs** — web back-office and mobile apps poll these endpoints (JWT). Web users get **in-app records only** (no FCM push).

| Surface | Base path |
|---------|----------|
| Web (Super Admin, Staff, Franchise Admin, Employee) | `GET/PUT {{baseUrl}}/api/notifications` |
| Mobile customer | `GET/PUT {{baseUrl}}/api/mobile/user/notifications` |
| Mobile partner | `GET/PUT {{baseUrl}}/api/mobile/partner/notifications` |

### List query filters (`GET /`)
| Param | Example | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `page` | `1` | Page number (default 1) |
| `limit` | `20` | Page size (max 100) |
| `is_read` | `false` | Filter read/unread |
| `category` | `admin` | `order`, `quote`, `subscription`, `wallet`, `ticket`, `chat`, `system`, `reminder`, `admin` |
| `event` | `BACKOFFICE_ORDER_CREATED` | Filter by event key |
| `from_date` | `2026-07-01` | `created_at` on/after (UTC day) |
| `to_date` | `2026-07-08` | `created_at` on/before (UTC day) |
| `franchise_id` | `{{franchise_id}}` | Optional franchise filter |

**Web tip:** use `category=admin` for dashboard alerts; use `category=order` etc. for franchise lifecycle items.

Unread count (`GET /unread-count`) accepts the same filters except `page`/`limit`/`is_read`.

item.name: Web — List notifications
item.description: **GET /api/notifications** — Paginated inbox for logged-in web user. Response: `records`, `totalItems`, `totalPages`, `currentPage`, `limit`, `unreadCount`.

item.name: 31 — Razorpay
item.description:
**/api/razorpay** — Payment Links (collect from customer/partner) + webhook.

| Route | Who calls | Purpose |
|-------|-----------|--------|
| `POST /razorpayWebhook` | Razorpay servers | `payment_link.paid` → complete order payment or subscription change |
| `GET /callback` | Browser after pay | Success redirect page |

**Configured in Razorpay dashboard:** Webhook URL = `{RAZORPAY_BASE_URL}/api/razorpay/razorpayWebhook` (env on Lambda, not Postman `{{baseUrl}}` unless same).

**Flows that create links:** Admin **21 → 3a**; Mobile user order payment / quote convert; Partner subscription `online_amount`.

**Not Razorpay:** Partner wallet **payout** (`/api/partner_payout`) — manual bank transfer.

Audit: `docs/RAZORPAY_ONLINE_PAYMENTS_AUDIT.md`

### Other exports

item.name: 37 — Partner payout
item.description:
**/api/partner_payout** — Partner wallet (credits from completed partner **order_payments**, debits from admin withdrawals).

**Not Razorpay:** manual payout to partner bank (`upi`, `bank_transfer`, `cash`, `cheque`). Inbound online pay uses Payment Links (orders / subscription); outbound bank transfer is separate.

**Frontend doc:** `docs/PARTNER_PAYOUT_FRONTEND.md` · **Audit:** `docs/RAZORPAY_ONLINE_PAYMENTS_AUDIT.md`

**Access:** Super admin (5) & staff (6) — all franchises; optional `franchise_id`. Franchise admin (1) & employee (3) — own franchise only. Partner (2) & customer (4) → **403**.

**Flow:** 1 getAll → 2 partners → 3 show (ledger) → 4 create.

**Variable:** `partnerMongoId` from getAll (Mongo `_id`).

request.description:
**GET /api/partner_payout/getAll** — Partner wallet summary table.

See **docs/PARTNER_PAYOUT_FRONTEND.md** §5.1. **Access:** §2.

**Response `data.records[]`:** `_id` (Mongo id for show/create), `partner_id` (business code), `partner_name`, `total_wallet_amount`, `last_withdraw_amount`, `last_withdraw_date` (YYYY-MM-DD), `wallet_status` (`pending` | `paid`).

request.description: **POST /api/mobile/partner/register** — Partner mobile signup (5 fields). No JWT. Returns `token` + `record`. Use Bearer token for onboarding APIs in this folder.

**POST /api/mobile/partner/login**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `email`, `password`
- **Optional:** `device_token` (FCM push token)
- **200** `data`: `auth_token`, `verification_status` (1 pending, 2 approved, 3 rejected), `verification_status_message`, `rejected_reasone`, `city_name`, …

**401:** `Invalid email.` | `Invalid password.`

Rejected partners can log in; catalog/bank/my-services **update** still requires approval.

**POST /api/mobile/partner/google-login**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `id_token` (Google Sign-In ID token from the partner mobile app)
- **Optional:** `device_token` (FCM), `phone_number`, `date_of_birth` (used on first-time registration only)

### Behavior
- Verifies `id_token` with Google (`GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_ANDROID_PARTNER`, `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_IOS_PARTNER`, optional `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_PARTNER` / `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_WEB_PARTNER`)
- Existing partner by `google_id` or email → login (`registration_type` unchanged)
- New partner → creates account (`registration_type: 2`), assigns basic subscription + notification settings
- **200** `data.auth_token` (same shape as **Login**)

**400:** Missing `id_token` | Google account without email
**401:** Invalid or expired Google token
**403:** Account blocked
**409:** Email/Google account conflict with customer or other account type
**500:** Google client IDs not configured

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/partner/forgot-password**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `email` (registered partner email, `type: 2` only)

### Behavior
- Sends a 6-digit OTP to the registered email (never sends a password)
- Always returns a generic success message to prevent email enumeration
- Invalidates any previous password-reset OTP for the account
- OTP expires in **5 minutes**; resend cooldown **60 seconds** per account

### Response
- **200:** `If an account exists, an OTP has been sent.`

**400:** `Email is required.` | `Invalid email format.`

Requires `EMAIL_USER` / `EMAIL_PASS` in server env.

**Next step:** **Verify forgot password OTP** → **Reset password** → **Login** with the new password.

exec: pm.test('Verify forgot password OTP success', function () {

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/partner/verify-forgot-password-otp**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `email`, `otp` (6-digit code from email)

### Behavior
- Validates OTP (max **5 attempts**, **5 min** expiry)
- On success returns a JWT `reset_token` valid for **10 minutes**
- Saves `reset_token` to `{{passwordResetToken}}`

### Response
- **200:** `{ verified: true, reset_token: "..." }`

**400:** `Invalid OTP.` | `OTP has expired.` | `OTP is required.` | `OTP must be a 6-digit code.`
**429:** `Maximum OTP verification attempts exceeded. Please request a new OTP.`

Set `{{passwordResetOtp}}` from the email received after **Forgot password**.

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `reset_token` (from **Verify forgot password OTP**), `new_password`

### Password rules
- Min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special character (`@$!%*?&`)

### Response
- **200:** `Password updated successfully`

**400:** `Invalid or expired reset token.` | password validation errors

**Next step:** **Login** with `{{email}}` and the new password.

**A — Partition toggle (default):** Body with **`active_categories`** and/or **`inactive_categories`** (ObjectId string arrays). They must **partition** every `category_id` in `categories_list`. **`categories_list` is not persisted** from this toggle. **Cascade:** any category moved to **inactive** forces services under that category (same franchise) from **`active_services`** → **`inactive_services`** on the mapping doc.

**B — Replace full list:** Super admin (or franchise admin under rules) may send **`categories_list`** — then `active_*` / `inactive_*` / **`categories_order`** are rebuilt from the payload.

**C — Reorder only:** **`categories_order`** alone (permutation of mapped ids). Responses hydrate `categories_list[].is_active` from `active_categories`.

**PATCH /api/mobile/partner/my-services/:id/status**

- **Auth:** Bearer — partner must be **approved** (`verification_status` 2)
- **Path:** `id` = partner_service row `_id` from **List my services** (`{{partnerServiceId}}`)
- **Body:** `{ "is_active": true | false }` (boolean or `"true"` / `"false"`)
- **200:** `{ success, status, message, data: { _id, is_active } }`
- **403** if not approved | **404** if row not found

**PATCH /api/mobile/partner/my-services/status**

- **Auth:** Bearer — partner must be **approved** (`verification_status` 2)
- **Body:** `updates` non-empty array; each item **required:** `_id` (partner_service row), `is_active` (true | false)
- **200:** `{ success, status, message, data: { updated: [{ _id, is_active }, ...] } }`
- **400** duplicate `_id` in request | **403** if not approved | **404** if any row not found

Run **List my services** first. For a single-row catalog, use one object in `updates` or set `{{partnerServiceId2}}` to a second row id.

**PUT /api/mobile/partner/my-services**

- **Auth:** Bearer — partner must be **approved** (`verification_status` 2)
- **Body:** `services` array; each item **required:** `_id` (partner_service row from List), `category_id`, `service_id`, `price`, `description`
- **200:** updated grouped `data[]` + message
- **403** if not approved | **404** if `_id` not found | **409** duplicate `service_id` on another row

See `docs/SUBSCRIPTION_CHANGE_FRONTEND.md`.

**GET /api/mobile/partner/subscription/changes**

- **Query:** `page` (default 1), `limit` (default 10, max 50)
- **200** `data.records[]`: completed upgrades/downgrades with proration and payment split

**GET /api/mobile/partner/subscription**

- **Auth:** Bearer `{{token}}`
- **200** `data`: `subscription` (plan, dates, status), `wallet_balance`, `days_used`, `days_total`

**POST /api/mobile/partner/subscription/change/preview**

- **200** `data`: `change_type` (upgrade|downgrade), proration breakdown, `amount_to_pay` or `wallet_credit`, `wallet_balance`

**POST /api/mobile/partner/subscription/change**

**Upgrade (cash):** `wallet_amount` + `cash_amount` must equal `amount_to_pay` from preview. Omitted amounts default to 0. Use **Apply plan change (upgrade — Razorpay online)** for `online_amount` instead of cash.

**Downgrade:** send only `target_plan_id` (no payment). Unused value credited to wallet; new plan period starts immediately.

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/partner/subscription/change** — upgrade via Razorpay (UPI / card / netbanking).

- **Body:** `target_plan_id`, `wallet_amount` (optional), `online_amount` (required for gateway portion)
- `wallet_amount + online_amount` must equal `amount_to_pay` from **Preview plan change**
- Use **either** `cash_amount` **or** `online_amount`, not both
- Partner profile must have `email` or `phone_number`

- **Auth:** Bearer partner — order must be assigned to caller (`partner_id`)
- **Path `orderId`:** order Mongo `_id` (24-char hex)

**200 `record`:** full order detail including `partner_summary` (partner earnings rollup), `partner_work_status`, `work_proof_image_urls`, `service_items[]`, `additional_charges[]`, payments, refunds when applicable. Use `partner_summary` for money UI; extra charges: partner `amount`, not `total_amount`.

**404** order not found or not assigned to partner | **400** invalid order id

Also included on **Get order details** (`record.additional_charges`).

**POST /api/mobile/partner/orders/:orderId/additional-charges**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner — order must be assigned to caller
- **Required:** `amount` (≥ 0, partner portion)
- **Optional:** `label`, `description`, `payment_method`, `charge_type`

**201:** `record` (with `partner_amount`), `partner_summary`, `order` pricing rollup

**PUT /api/mobile/partner/orders/:orderId/additional-charges/:chargeId**

- Partial body; recalculates order totals

- **Auth:** Bearer partner

**200:** `record` with updated order detail

item.name: User
item.description: **Customer / end-user mobile app** — **02 — Auth**: phone OTP (`/login` → `/verify-otp`) or **Google login** (`/google-login`). Then home, orders, addresses, quotes, profile. Regenerated from `Help-PR-Mobile-APIs.postman_collection.json`.

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/login**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `phone_number` (E.164 style, e.g. `+919876543210`)

### Behavior
- If phone is new → creates customer (`type: 4`) in `users`
- If customer exists → reuses account
- If phone belongs to partner/admin → **409**
- Stores hashed OTP in `otp` collection (dev OTP: **123456**, 10 min expiry)
- **429** if a valid OTP was already sent for this number

No SMS is sent in the current build.

**POST /api/mobile/user/verify-otp**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `phone_number`, `otp` (use `123456` in dev)
- **Optional:** `device_token` (FCM)

### Behavior
- Validates OTP → issues JWT on `data.auth_token`
- Updates `device_token`, `last_signin` on user
- Deletes used OTP row

**400:** Invalid or expired OTP
**401:** Customer not found (run Login first)
**403:** Account blocked

**POST /api/mobile/user/google-login**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `id_token` (Google Sign-In ID token from the mobile app)
- **Optional:** `device_token` (FCM)

### Behavior
- Verifies `id_token` with Google (`GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_ANDROID`, `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_IOS`, optional `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` / `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_WEB`)
- Finds customer by `google_id`, or links existing customer by email, or creates new customer (`registration_type: 2`)
- Returns JWT on `data.auth_token` (same shape as **Verify OTP**)

**400:** Missing `id_token`
**401:** Invalid or expired Google token
**403:** Account blocked
**409:** Email/Google account conflict with another account type
**500:** Google client IDs not configured on server

exec: pm.expect(j.message).to.eql('If an account exists, an OTP has been sent.');

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/forgot-password**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `email` (registered customer email, `type: 4` only)

### Behavior
- Sends a 6-digit OTP to the registered email (never sends a password)
- Always returns a generic success message to prevent email enumeration
- Invalidates any previous password-reset OTP for the account
- OTP expires in **5 minutes**; resend cooldown **60 seconds** per account

### Response
- **200:** `If an account exists, an OTP has been sent.`

**400:** `Email is required.` | `Invalid email format.`

Customer **sign-in** is normally OTP via **Login** → **Verify OTP**. Use this flow when the customer has an email on file. Set `{{customerEmail}}` via **Update** or collection variables. Requires `EMAIL_USER` / `EMAIL_PASS` on the server.

**Next step:** **Verify forgot password OTP** → **Reset password**.

exec: pm.test('Verify forgot password OTP success', function () {

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/verify-forgot-password-otp**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `email`, `otp` (6-digit code from email)

### Behavior
- Validates OTP (max **5 attempts**, **5 min** expiry)
- On success returns a JWT `reset_token` valid for **10 minutes**
- Saves `reset_token` to `{{passwordResetToken}}`

### Response
- **200:** `{ verified: true, reset_token: "..." }`

**400:** `Invalid OTP.` | `OTP has expired.` | `OTP is required.` | `OTP must be a 6-digit code.`
**429:** `Maximum OTP verification attempts exceeded. Please request a new OTP.`

Set `{{passwordResetOtp}}` from the email received after **Forgot password**.

**POST /api/mobile/user/reset-password**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `reset_token` (from **Verify forgot password OTP**), `new_password`

### Password rules
- Min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special character (`@$!%*?&`)

### Response
- **200:** `Password updated successfully`

**400:** `Invalid or expired reset token.` | password validation errors

**No JWT.** Only **`type`: 2** and **`is_from_web`: false** (`publicPartnerRegisterMiddleware`). Web/admin-created partners must use **User → Create user** with auth. Optional **`image`** file field; enable and attach a file to satisfy profile rules without `profile_url`.

- Fields: `_id`, `state_id`, `city_id`, `area_id`, `pincode`, `address`, `state_name`, `city_name`, `area_name`, `address_status`, `deleted_at`, `created_at`, `updated_at`

item.name: Orders & payments
item.description:
**Customer orders & Razorpay online pay.**

1. **List orders** — sets `{{orderId}}`
2. **Create order payment (Razorpay online)** — **202** + `{{orderPaymentUrl}}`
3. Pay in browser (test card `4111…` / UPI `success@razorpay`)
4. **Get order payment status** — poll until `data.status` is `completed`

**Additional charges:** partner adds charge → customer pays increased due via step 2 (no separate Razorpay on charge API).

See `docs/RAZORPAY_ONLINE_PAYMENTS_AUDIT.md`.

request.description: **GET /api/mobile/user/orders** — sets `orderId` from first order with due amount (or first row).
**POST** `payment_method: online` → **202** + `record.payment_url`.
**GET .../payment-status** — poll after Razorpay; `sync.synced: true` if webhook missed.

item.name: Quotes
item.description:
Customer quote requests (Phase 1). **Auth:** Bearer customer JWT (`type` 4) after **Verify OTP**.

**Prerequisites:** **Home** (`{{franchiseId}}`, `{{categoryId}}`, `{{serviceId}}`), **Addresses → Create** (`{{addressId}}`). For **with partner**, run **Partners (list)** first (`{{quotePartnerId}}`). Partner must **Accept** quote before convert.

**Convert to order:** offline (`cash`, `upi`, …) → **200**; **`payment_method: online`** → **202** + `data.payment.payment_url` — use **Get order payment status** on the new order.

**Two create types (same endpoint):**
| Type | `partner_id` | Initial status |
|------|----------------|----------------|
| Without partner | omit or `""` | **new** |
| With partner | valid partner ObjectId | **pending** |

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/quotes/create** — no partner

- **No `partner_id` in body** → quote status **new**, `partner_id` null
- **Pricing:** `total_service_charge` / `total_price` are **0** until a partner is assigned (**Update** with `partner_id` → server sets charge from `partner_service.price`)
- Do not send `total_service_charge` on this flow
- **`admin_description`** is web back-office only (not accepted on mobile customer API)
- Franchise admin sees quote under `franchise_id`; partner assigned later via **Update** or admin

**POST /api/mobile/user/quotes/create** — with partner

- **Required:** `partner_id` (run **Partners (list)** or **Home** to set `{{quotePartnerId}}`)
- **`total_service_charge` optional:** resolved from that partner's `partner_service.price` when omitted
- **`admin_description`** is web back-office only (not accepted on mobile customer API)
- Status **pending**; partner can **Accept** under **Partner → Quotes**

query.description: new | pending | accepted | success | failed — leave empty for all
Optional — quote_sequence_id, quote_description, cancellation_reason, rejection_reason (alias: q)

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/user/quotes**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Lists quotes for authenticated customer only
- **Pagination:** `page`, `limit` (max 50)
- **Search:** `search` (or `q`) on `quote_sequence_id`, `quote_description`, `cancellation_reason`, `rejection_reason`
- **Date range:** `from_date`, `to_date` (YYYY-MM-DD) — quotes whose schedule window overlaps the range (same as admin quote list)
- **Filters:** optional `status`, optional `franchise_id`
- **200:** `totalItems` (all matching filters), `todayCount` (subset whose schedule overlaps **today** UTC, same filters), `totalPages`, `currentPage`, `limit`, `records[]`

**GET /api/mobile/user/quotes/:id**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer — own quotes only
- **200** `data`: quote detail with populated refs + partner service enrichment

**PUT /api/mobile/user/quotes/:id**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Allowed only while status is **new** or **pending**
- **Cannot update:** `total_service_charge`, `service_price`, `status`, `franchise_id`, **`admin_description`** (web back-office only)
- Assigning `partner_id` on a **new** quote moves status to **pending**
- Send only fields to change

**PUT /api/mobile/user/quotes/:id/cancel**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Sets status to **failed** with optional `cancellation_reason`
- Not allowed on terminal quotes (`success` / `failed`)

**POST /api/mobile/user/quotes/:id/convert-to-order**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Quote must be **accepted** and owned by caller
- **Required:** `amount`, `payment_method`
- `amount` >= `minimum_deposit_amount`

**Offline (`cash`, `upi`, etc.):** **200** — order + completed/pending payment.

**`payment_method: online`:** **202** — pending `order_payment` + `payment.payment_url` (no order yet). Pay via Razorpay, then poll **`GET .../quotes/:id/deposit-payment/:paymentId/payment-status`**; order is created after payment confirms.
Convert with **online** deposit. **202** + `data.payment.payment_url`. Sets `orderId` and `orderPaymentId` collection vars for payment-status poll.

item.name: Posts
item.description:
Customer post feed, gallery, liked/saved lists, like, save, share, report — `post_routes.js`. See `docs/PARTNER_POST_FRONTEND.md`.

**Suggested order:** **Home** (sets `{{franchiseId}}`) → **Feed** (sets `{{postId}}`) → **Like post** / **Save post** → **Liked posts** / **Saved posts**.

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/user/posts/feed**

Run **Home** first for `{{franchiseId}}`.

| Query | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|--------|
| `franchise_id` | Yes | Franchise ObjectId |
| `page` | No | Default 1 (`{{postsPage}}`) |
| `limit` | No | Default 10, max 50 (`{{postsLimit}}`) |

Each record includes `partner`, `linked`, `is_liked`, `is_saved`, counts, and `share_url`. Sets `{{postId}}` and `{{postShareToken}}` from the first row.

**GET /api/mobile/user/partners/:partnerId/posts**

Partner work gallery. Same post shape as feed (without nested `partner` on each card). Optional `franchise_id` for scope validation.

**GET /api/mobile/user/posts/liked**

Customer's liked posts across franchises. **No `franchise_id`.**

| Query | Notes |
|-------|--------|
| `page` | Default 1 (`{{postsPage}}`) |
| `limit` | Default 10, max 50 (`{{postsLimit}}`) |

Only **published** posts are returned. Sorted by most recently liked. Each record includes `liked_at`, `is_liked: true`, `is_saved`, `partner`, and `linked`.

**GET /api/mobile/user/posts/saved**

Customer's saved posts across franchises. **No `franchise_id`.**

| Query | Notes |
|-------|--------|
| `page` | Default 1 (`{{postsPage}}`) |
| `limit` | Default 10, max 50 (`{{postsLimit}}`) |

Only **published** posts are returned. Sorted by most recently saved. Each record includes `saved_at`, `is_saved: true`, `is_liked`, `partner`, and `linked`.

**GET /api/mobile/user/posts/:postId**

Single post detail. Optional `franchise_id` for franchise scope validation. Includes `is_liked` and `is_saved`.
**GET /api/mobile/user/posts/share/:shareToken** — no auth.

**POST /api/mobile/user/posts/:postId/like**

Toggle like/unlike. No request body.

**200 `data`:** `{ post_id, is_liked, likes_count }`

**POST /api/mobile/user/posts/:postId/save**

| Input | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|--------|
| Path `postId` | Yes | `{{postId}}` — from **Feed** or **Get post** |
| Request body | **No** | API does not read the body. `{}` is a Postman placeholder only. |
| `Authorization` | Yes | Customer Bearer `{{token}}` |

Post must be **published**.

**Responses**
- **201** first save
- **200** already saved (idempotent)
- **404** post not found

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 201,
  "message": "Post saved successfully.",
  "data": {
    "post_id": "...",
    "franchise_id": "...",
    "is_saved": true,
    "saved_at": "2026-06-02T10:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

**DELETE /api/mobile/user/posts/:postId/save**

| Input | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|--------|
| Path `postId` | Yes | `{{postId}}` |
| Request body | **No** | DELETE has no payload |
| `Authorization` | Yes | Customer Bearer `{{token}}` |

**Responses**
- **200** removed from saved list
- **404** post was not saved

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 200,
  "message": "Post removed from saved list.",
  "data": {
    "post_id": "...",
    "is_saved": false
  }
}
```

response.name: 200 Removed

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/posts/:postId/share**

Records a share and returns `{ share_url, share_token, shares_count }`. No request body.

**POST /api/mobile/user/posts/:postId/report**

**Body:** `{ reason, details? }` — reasons: `spam`, `inappropriate`, `misleading`, `other`. **409** if already reported.

item.name: Chat & Disputes
item.description:
Customer **support chat** and **order disputes** (completed orders only).

**Doc:** `docs/CHAT_MODULE_FRONTEND.md`

**Flow:** Complete order → **Raise dispute** OR **Start support chat** → use `{{chatId}}` with **39 — Chat → Messages** (admin) or Socket.IO.

Order group chat: `record.chat_id` on **GET order** or admin **GET /api/chat/by-order/:orderId`.

item.name: Raise dispute
item.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/disputes**

| Field | Required |
|-------|----------|
| `order_id` | Yes — completed order owned by customer |
| `reason` | No |
| `description` | No |

**409** if open dispute exists or order not completed.

Sets `{{disputeId}}` and `{{chatId}}`.

item.name: Start support chat
item.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/chats/support**

| Field | Required |
|-------|----------|
| `employee_id` | No — auto-picks franchise employee if omitted |
| `franchise_id` | No |
| `initial_message` | No |

Returns existing open chat for same customer + employee pair.
